title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 242.410 - Board may remove any officer or employee
text:
242.410.  Board may remove any officer or employee. — The board of supervisors may at any time remove any officer, attorney or other employee appointed or employed by said board.
(RSMo 1939 § 12375) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10794; 1919 § 4424; 1909 § 5528
